sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29019" key="duszwi/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ζωΐα</orth>, <sense id="n29019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δυσοδία</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
